feature_description: Locked-input feature set for nonlinear challenger v2. It intentionally reuses the same five confirmed5 inputs and introduces no new feature freedom. volatility_20d remains part of the fixed input set and is also the predeclared state input for the post-score volatility discount contract.
d0_visibility_statement: All listed features and any score-transformation inputs must be computable using D0-visible information only. No D1 entry, realized exit, terminal pricing, or post-signal execution outcome may appear in feature computation or score transformation.
leakage_risk_notes: Do not include labels, realized execution outcomes, terminal exit results, frozen ranking outputs, or any field known only after D0 signal formation. The v2 transformation layer must remain PIT-safe and depend only on raw model score and same-day D0-visible state inputs.
missing_value_policy: Missing values may only be handled by a preregistered training-time policy inherited from the locked model config; no feature-specific validation-driven imputation changes are allowed.
winsorize_or_clip_policy: No new feature clipping or tail surgery may be introduced in v2. The only new freedom is the preregistered post-score transformation contract declared in the v2 model_config.
standardization_policy: No mandatory global standardization is introduced. v2 does not add preprocessing freedom beyond the fixed score transformation contract.
training_authorization_prerequisites: confirmed5 source mapping must be re-confirmed for all five locked inputs
volatility_20d source mapping must be explicitly accepted as the fixed auxiliary state input for score transformation
validator must pass before any training authorization
